description: HubSpot is an all-in-one customer platform that unifies CRM, marketing, sales, and service with built-in AI, giving teams one view to grow and retain customers.
overview: HubSpot connects marketing, sales, and customer service on one CRM platform, adding AI tools and a large app ecosystem so teams work from a single customer view.
what_is: HubSpot is an all-in-one customer platform that unites marketing, sales, and service teams on a single CRM. It keeps business data in one place so teams can manage leads, close deals, and support customers without stitching tools together, with built-in AI to speed routine work.

It is useful for managing relationships, automating outreach, running campaigns, and scaling support. Because the hubs share one data model, teams can start seeing value quickly and add capabilities as they grow.

HubSpot connects with a very large app marketplace to keep systems unified across marketing, sales, service, content, and data. It is not an accounting or heavy ERP system; it is built for growth-focused go-to-market teams.
